title: podocarpium podocarpum var. fallax
intro: Podocarpium podocarpum var. fallax, also known as the New Zealand podocarp or yellow pine, is a plant species of the genus Podocarpium, belonging to the podocarpaceae family. The plant's medicinal properties include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects, which have been used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Podocarpium podocarpum var. fallax include its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, reduce inflammation, and promote expectoration. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve using the leaves and resin to create teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
